title: Provincial
description: A mod that adds a number of features, inspired initially by the mod Rustic.
body:
Spiritual Successor to Rustic. Adds decorative blocks, mostly, plus the ability to grow apple trees and great oak trees

Current Features:

- Apple Trees. Get apples seeds from apples or apple cores, plant them and wait for them to grow, both individually and 2x2.
- Great Oak Trees. Plant oak saplings 2x2.
- Crossed Logs, vertical and otherwise. Crafted from logs. Currently decorative.
- Stakes, plus crossed log compatibility. Also crafted from logs. Currently decorative.
    Covering partial blocks with leaves by right clicking the leaf on. Can remove with shears.
- Ironwood Trees, their woodset, and ironberries, which can be smelted into iron nuggets. Now with actual spawning behavior!

Planned Features:

- Grapes.
- Crushing Tub & Evaporation Basin.
- Brewing.


Credit to Eris and Zoey for their work on Rustic and Homespun, from which some assets were used with permission!
